summary: Re-invocation of frontend-coding-agent for Issue #13 (FR-PERS-001). Implementation was already complete from prior invocation (022). All components verified: ActionBar.tsx (Save button with data-testid="btn-save", async save, QuotaExceededError handling), Notification.tsx (auto-dismiss 3s, error detection via includes('error'), role=status aria-live=polite), persistenceService.ts (saveModel/loadModel via LocalForage, schema v1.0.0). PR #48 was merged into main. All 4 test cases (T-FE-PERS-001-01 through T-FE-PERS-001-04) are passing. No new work required.

artifacts.description: Save/Load/Export/Import buttons with async handlers, QuotaExceededError handling, data-testid=btn-save

artifacts.name: Notification.tsx
artifacts.description: Auto-dismissing notification overlay, error detection via includes('error'), role=status aria-live=polite

artifacts.description: saveModel/loadModel via LocalForage with schema versioning v1.0.0 and PersistedModel interface
